text:
36 PRs merged this week. We made larger models free, put our AI in charge of our GitHub issues, and added 21 community apps to the showcase.

·˚✿ POLLINATIONS WEEKLY ✿˚·
vol.42 — routing, robots & docs

→ THE FREE TIER
gptimage-large and FLUX.1 Kontext are now completely free.

→ BACKEND ROULETTE
Rolled DeepSeek and Kimi from Azure back to Fireworks for stability. Routed Gemini-2.5-flash-lite to Vertex global. The endless API dance continues.

→ REPO AUTOMATION
Polly (our AI mascot) is now fully in charge of GitHub issue triage. She reads the incoming tickets and decides every action dynamically. 

→ DOCS & DX
Compressed APIDOCS.md from 94KB down to 37KB. Added dynamic balance-based request estimates to the pricing table, so you know exactly how many generations your pollen gets you.

→ COMMUNITY
Merged 21 new apps into the showcase this week. Image generators, chat interfaces, and an Isekai Character Generator.

Infrastructure is open source. Come build something weird: github.com/pollinations/pollinations

#OpenSource #AI #DevTools
